microsoft_ft: Owned end-to-end program execution for Azure's **resilience validation portfolio**, scaling from a 2-person operation to a platformized system sustaining 45+ annual drills and driving **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise mission partners.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a rack-level drill program in **4 months** at a 94% recovery rate—surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a new C2-style continuous validation model.

Directed **14 cross-org recovery executions** under executive visibility, including serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract with strict fielding timelines.
Built an internal AI agent and restructured sprint planning workflows to reduce **program planning cycle time by 39%** and increase drill execution capacity by 21% without adding headcount.

Embedded with customer and engineering stakeholders across Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp to surface mission-critical requirements, shaping the **product roadmap** and validating outcomes against contractual objectives.

Orchestrated cross-functional execution across engineering, finance, legal, and technical operations teams to deliver **complex hardware-software integration** programs on operationally-relevant schedules.
microsoft_2023: Championed adoption of AI-driven code generation workflows across **14 engineering teams**, conducting user demos and structured training that saved 37 monthly engineering hours and accelerated iterative development cycles.

Shaped the product roadmap toward **intent-based YAML generation** by leading 11+ user interviews with Azure service teams, surfacing critical feature gaps and translating operator needs into actionable engineering requirements.

Accelerated data retrieval and C2-style information access by migrating documentation to an **AI-powered semantic search** platform with rigorous metadata standards, cutting average lookup time by 83%.

Mobilized a product strategy to eliminate operational toil during region launches—conducting discovery with **20+ service teams**, quantifying 81 manual hours per region, and building a roadmap to automate critical execution paths.

Enabled executive decision-making by engineering a **Power BI dashboard** tracking toil metrics across 140+ teams, surfacing automation gaps and allowing leadership to prioritize high-impact program investments.

Facilitated Agile sprint planning and retrospectives for a cross-functional engineering team, prioritizing **40+ high-priority tickets** and stabilizing the developer intake process to sustain iterative delivery velocity.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and lifted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing the website and Google Business profile to improve mission-partner-facing communications.
